description: Performs normalization and probe-level summarization to generate a SNP file for a set of Affymetrix SNP chip CEL files.
author: David Twomey, Joshua Gould, Marc-Danie Nazaire
plan:
## SNPFileCreator GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SNPFileCreator is a GenePattern module that Performs normalization and probe-level summarization to generate a SNP file for a set of Affymetrix SNP chip CEL files.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 10 parameters:
- Required: cel.files, normalization.method, summarization.method, sort.by.chromosome.and.location, include.RandomGC.probesets, use.mismatch.probes, output.prefix
- Optional: genome.annotation, genome.annotation.file, cdf.file

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>snp.jar<path.separator><libdir>opencsv-1.7.jar<path.separator><libdir>ant.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-math-1.2.jar<path.separator><libdir>Jama-1.0.2.jar<path.separator><libdir>log4j.jar<path.separator><libdir>AffxFusion.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.snp.SNPFileCreator -lib<libdir> -cdf<cdf.file> -dir<cel.files> -out<output.prefix> -mmt<summarization.method> -nmt<normalization.method> -srt<sort.by.chromosome.and.location> -gif<genome.annotation.file> -alsyes -oclyes -txtyes -log<libdir>log4j.properties -mmp<use.mismatch.probes> -rgc<include.RandomGC.probesets> -fmtsnp -gan<genome.annotation>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: genome.annotation
parameters.description: The genome annotation to use. Either a genome annotation or genome annotation file must be specified, but not both.

parameters.name: genome.annotation.file
parameters.description: Genome annotation file. Either a genome annotation or genome annotation file must be specified, but not both.

parameters.name: summarization.method
parameters.description: The summarization method to apply for SNP probes.

parameters.name: sort.by.chromosome.and.location
parameters.description: Whether to sort output file by chromosome and location. Filters out probesets without location information.

parameters.name: include.RandomGC.probesets
parameters.description: Whether to include RandomGC probesets in output

parameters.name: cdf.file
parameters.description: Custom CDF file.(.cdf, .cdf.gz) Leave blank to use default internally provided CDF file.

parameters.name: use.mismatch.probes
parameters.description: Whether to use any mismatch probes in summarization step. NOTE\: For data older than 250K, you will most likely want to set this to yes.

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: The base name for the output files
